title: Run Tests Script Settings
description: Template: plugin-driven tests and coverage badges. Product repos override this file via Update-RepoUtils preserve.

plugins.DotNetTest: Runs dotnet test with Coverlet for one or more test projects (project/projects).
plugins.NpmJestTest: Alternative for npm/Jest repos: workspaceRoot, testScript, coverageDirectory.
plugins.QualityGate: Reads shared context metrics; set coverageThreshold > 0 to enforce minimum line coverage.
plugins.CoverageBadges: Writes SVG badges from shared context metrics into badgesDir.
